Test name: Pedestrian target right (Ego speed = 60 km/h)

Test Description

In this scenario, the subject vehicle shall travel at a constant speed to pass centrally between the two stationary pedestrian targets.

  • Regulation or protocol: UN Regulation No. 152
  • Ego speed: 60 km/h
  • Target speed: 0 km/h
  • TTC at start: greater than 4 s
  • Lateral distance from ego to target: 1 m
Home Summary Repetition 1 Repetition 2 Repetition 3
←Pedestrian target left (Ego speed = 40 km/h) Pedestrian target right (Ego speed = 60 km/h) Pedestrian target left (Ego speed = 60 km/h)→


Test Summary

Observations

The static target's position was estimated by measuring the target's position from ego to LiDAR detection using RVIZ visualizer. Absolute values have been used to compare detections with RTK, instead of relative values.
